response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack experience and notable geospatial project work via GISCollective, but lacks direct C++/Rust experience in routing, navigation, or distributed data pipelines — key requirements for the role. His DLang and Node.js background shows systems-level aptitude, but the absence of proven expertise in routing tile generation, real-time traffic integration, or production-scale geospatial data systems raises significant gaps.
strengths: Built open-source geospatial platform (GISCollective) with real-world NGO usage
Demonstrated systems-level programming with DLang, asynchronous I/O, and low-latency apps
Strong track record of learning new technologies and contributing across full stack
concerns: No demonstrated commercial experience with C++ or Rust in routing or geospatial pipelines
Lacks explicit experience with routing tile optimization, map data transformation, or navigation QA
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, not aligned with C++-centric job requirements
